title: Oracle Pluggable Database
description: Represents an Oracle Pluggable Database (PDB) in a multitenant container database architecture. PDBs are portable, self-contained database containers that share the resources of a container database (CDB).

pdb_id.description: Unique identifier for the PDB within the CDB

id.description: The OCID of the pluggable database (OCI managed)

containerDatabaseId.description: The OCID of the container database (OCI managed)

compartmentId.description: The OCID of the compartment (OCI managed)

open_mode.description: Current open mode of the PDB

lifecycleState.description: OCI lifecycle state of the PDB

total_size.description: Total size of the PDB in bytes

creation_time.description: Timestamp when the PDB was created

pdbDefault.description: Default connection string for the PDB

pdbIpDefault.description: IP-based default connection string for the PDB
